text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I'm thirsty.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
The dry air takes all the moisture from my mouth
and irritates my throat.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: It's uncomfortable. It hurts... but...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I don't want to stop breathing like this.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I just want to run with all of my might!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian wins! Narita Brian has taken first
place and conquered the Emperor!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Wooooow! That's so, so, sooo coooool!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
That was too exciting! My heart won't stop
pounding!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: If I beat Brian, that'd be even more fun!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Ahahah, it's decided! ☆ I'm gonna do my best!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: To think that I would lose...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Look at everyone's faces. They are overjoyed to
see the birth of a new champion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...So, tell me. How is the view from the top?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...It's different than I expected.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Different?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I thought nothing could ever feel better than
when I was racing. But now that I'm here...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm anticipating what kind of heart-pounding race
I'll be able to do next.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oh... Haha!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: So, you are still not satiated? ...I see.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Listen, Brian. Right now, the world is trying to
label you "successor to the Emperor."

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: However, you and I are different. Am I correct?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... It's better that way. Thanks to that, you
can forge your own path.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Others will learn the way by following your
footprints. That's why, for now, you must run as
far as you can.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'm back, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Thanks. I'm a little tired, though, so I'm going to
lay down for a minute.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Until you've finished making a training plan for
the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
In the meantime, I'm going to use your lap as a
pillow.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Just messing with you. I'll be in that chair over
there.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
But you better wake me up. I won't be happy if
you just leave me here.
choice_data_list: Got it. Training plan for the Arima Kinen, right?
Got it. Training plan for the Arima Kinen, right?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Yawn... That's right. Get it ready quick, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I get started on the our plan for the
Arima Kinen while listening to Narita Brian sleep
peacefully nearby.
